case_title: OSCAR ARMANDO VALIENTE VS. JAMIE ANTONIO GUEVARA CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALIENTE, OSCAR ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA CAMPOS, JAMIE ANTONIO , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CALIFORNIA UNLIMITED TRANSPORTATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
